events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

events.name: ice_volcano
events.description: Ice geyser breaks through permafrost near the colony perimeter.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

governance.rationale: Appoint a strong leader to guide us through crisis.

meta_awareness.insight: Dax Iron dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
